module.name: Busbar Anonymize & Extract
module.blurb: Extract data from a source org, anonymize it, and load it into a target sandbox.
module.longDescription: Backed by the dedicated, typesynth-free `sf-anonymize-extract` binary (not `busbar-sf`). Extracts from the source org via the Bulk API, anonymizes PII through the fake-based transform engine, validates residual PII before load (aborting if PII remains), snapshots the target for rollback, and loads into the target. Rollback is MANUAL via the backup-id (no automated in-place restore in v1).
